title: Playground Run Ledger
concept: A diagnostics-first WordPress Playground workspace for Blueprint authors that leads with runtime health, logs, database facts, and embedded site status while keeping creation, save, saved management, Site Manager, import, export, and Blueprint gallery flows available as modal-free inline panels.
focus: diagnostics and logs as the first viewport
database and environment facts surfaced before creation tasks
warm editorial accents supporting dense operational controls
flows: Monitor active Playground health, logs, database status, network state, save status, and embedded WordPress preview from the first screen
Navigate the active WordPress site with refresh, path input, Homepage, and WP Admin controls
Create a Playground from Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, or imported .zip
Save a temporary Playground in browser storage or to a local directory and see file-copy progress
Browse saved and unsaved Playgrounds, open saved entries, rename a saved Playground, and delete a saved Playground
Browse and filter all 43 Blueprint gallery entries with featured shortcuts
Use Site Manager inline panels for settings, file browser, Blueprint editing, database tools, and logs
Move artifacts through GitHub export, zip download, zip import, Blueprint link copy, Blueprint bundle download, Blueprint run, and database.sqlite download
featureCoverage: create from Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub with account connection note
browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries
save temporary Playground in browser storage
edit WordPress, PHP, and language settings
explain destructive reset and stored reload behavior
use File browser with create file, create folder, upload, browse, and code editing affordances
view, copy, download, and run the current Blueprint bundle
inspect database driver, path, and size
inspect Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs with empty states
